Text.Page:
I hear {@LinkCreature:62#1014$$Finn} wants to get back to his pirating ways. We need to do something about that.

Tell you what, pass some grog around to his shipmates and get them into such a stupor that they'll be in no shape to sail with him.

Trust me, everyone's better off with Finn in dry dock.

That {@LinkCreature:62#1014$$Finn} fella asked me to join his crew! I hear he was a legend in his time.

Hey, what’s that in your hands?"My own private selection. Try some."
You know, I’ve been craving a sip of rum since yesterday. Thanks!

{@LinkCreature:62#1014$$Finn} asked me to join his crew the other day. I wasn't sure, but then he threw some money at me.

Who am I to say no to money?"Excellent point. Let's celebrate with a drink!"

I refuse good rum like I refuse money. Never!

Thanks!

I'm going to be part of {@LinkCreature:62#1014$$Finn}'s crew! I'm so excited!

I've wanted to be a pirate for so long, but I never thought I'd get the chance!"Ah, but can you handle your rum like a pirate?"
What? Oh, but I've never...I mean...yes! Of course I can. Give me that bottle!
Can't talk. Too much to do. I've got to settle all my affairs so I can join {@LinkCreature:62#1014$$Finn}'s crew.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"A quick swig should relax you."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>
You know, all this organizing is rather stressful. Thank you.

What do you mean, I can't go pirating today?

I got my key. I got a ship. I got a new crew. All I need now is somethin' to plunder.

Am I missing something?"Your crew is too sloshed to sail."

What? You're kidding. Those dolts!

And here I thought the key was a sign. The wind was perfect for pillaging today, too. I guess the weather never breaks for poor Finn.

Good work! I for one am glad that Finn won't be out there making a mess of things.

He's such a superstitious pirate, this may deter him for good.
